name: a cloud named in a business answer fires its platform workload type even when the vision prose is cloud-agnostic
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a platform that assesses skills and issues credentials" --answer "cloud=we deploy on AWS" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["workload_types"].include?("aws-platform") ? 0:1)' && echo cloud-from-answer 1>&2
